name: bow-agent
description: Self-hosted AI coding agent with a human approval gate. Turn a Jira ticket, WBS doc, or plain task into a reviewed plan, then let it execute — every write approved by you. Role-based modes for QC, BA, Reviewer and remote collaborators.
author: Bow-T

scripts.ui: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "npm run ui:web"
scripts.ui:qc: BOW_QC_MODE=true concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "vite --host"
scripts.ui:review: BOW_REVIEWER_MODE=true concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "vite --host"
scripts.ui:devops: BOW_DEVOPS_MODE=true concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "vite --host"
scripts.ui:restart: npm run ui:stop && npm run ui:qc
scripts.ui:preview: npm run ui:build && node --loader tsx src/web/server.ts
scripts.ui:qc:share: npm run ui:build && BOW_QC_MODE=true BOW_SERVE_STATIC=true BOW_AGENT_PORT=4001 npm run ui:api
scripts.ui:collab: npm run ui:build && BOW_COLLAB_MODE=true BOW_SERVE_STATIC=true BOW_AGENT_PORT=4002 npm run ui:api
scripts.ui:ba: npm run ui:build && BOW_BA_MODE=true BOW_SERVE_STATIC=true BOW_AGENT_PORT=4003 npm run ui:api
scripts.ui:review:share: npm run ui:build && BOW_REVIEWER_MODE=true BOW_SERVE_STATIC=true BOW_AGENT_PORT=4004 npm run ui:api
scripts.ui:devops:share: npm run ui:build && BOW_DEVOPS_MODE=true BOW_SERVE_STATIC=true BOW_AGENT_PORT=4005 npm run ui:api
